rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash description and no amount for this line. The value 1 3 7 is the consolidated total for the braced group, which ends on a later line. gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned 1 3 7 to this row.

rows.description: Kidlington Merry tea 3d August 74 to Michl 1875
rows.notes: This entry combines the descriptions from gemini-flash R21 and R22. Visual verification confirms the amount 11s 3d belongs to this combined description. gemini-flash incorrectly assigned no amount to R21 and 2s 9d to R22. gpt-5-mini combined the description (as R20) but misaligned 11 to the pounds column.
rows.english_description: Payment from Kidlington described as 'merry tea' charge at a 3d rate covering August 1874 to Michaelmas 1875.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment from Kidlington for 'merry tea' covering August 1874 to Michaelmas 1875, amounting to £0 11s 3d.

rows.description: Merton Cottage from April 24/75 t L Day/75

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment relating to Merton Cottage (from 24 April 1875 to Lady Day 1875), amounting to £0 2s 9d.
